text: ⛳ COURSE UPDATE • Hole 20 is in play while Hole 18 remains closed. Thank you for your cooperation. ⛳
⏱️ PACE OF PLAY • Please keep up with the group ahead to help everyone enjoy their round. ⏱️
🌱 PLEASE REPAIR YOUR DIVOTS • Every repaired divot helps keep the course in great condition for everyone. 🌱
🚮 PLEASE USE THE COURSE BINS • Help keep our course clean and enjoyable for everyone. 🚮
🟢 PLEASE REPAIR YOUR PITCH MARKS • A repaired pitch mark today helps provide smoother greens
🚗 PLEASE USE THE CART PATHS • Help protect our fairways and surrounds by keeping carts on designated paths where provided. 🚗
🛺 BLUE LINES ARE THERE TO PROTECT OUR GREENS • Please follow the "Cart This Way" signs and keep carts outside the marked areas. 🛺
🎉 GOOD LUCK TO ALL COMPETITORS TODAY! 🎉
🍻 VISIT THE CLUBHOUSE AFTER YOUR ROUND • Food and refreshments are available. 🍻
